title: strip_prefix fallback silently corrupts content hashes in hash_directory
description: manifest.rs:147-153 — Same pattern as library.rs: unwrap_or(entry.path()) uses absolute path as hash key when strip_prefix fails. Two identical skill dirs in different locations would hash identically. Fix: propagate as error.

title: strip_prefix fallback silently misplaces copied files in copy_dir_recursive
description: library.rs:297 — unwrap_or(entry.path()) falls back to the absolute source path when strip_prefix fails. On most platforms, dst.join(absolute_path) replaces the base, writing files to wrong filesystem locations. Fix: propagate as error with with_context().

title: Missing test: managed-to-local strategy transition silently deletes library data
description: library.rs — consolidate_managed removes existing real dir to create symlink when skill transitions from local to managed. No test covers this. A regression silently deletes user data.

title: tome doctor crashes with IO error in non-interactive mode
description: doctor.rs:133 — Confirm::interact() called without checking stdin().is_terminal(). All other prompts in codebase guard with is_terminal(). Fix: add TTY guard.

title: git subprocess calls discard stderr giving opaque failure messages
description: lib.rs:793-830 — All three git calls use .status() which discards stdout/stderr. When git fails, user sees only exit code. Fix: use .output() and surface stderr on failure.

title: unwrap on pre-partitioned Ok vec in discover_directory is undocumented and fragile
description: discover.rs:389 — entries.unwrap() is safe only due to partition logic above, but has no comment. Fix: replace with .expect or if-let guard.

title: symlink_points_to silently discards canonicalize errors causing stale or thrashing symlinks
description: paths.rs:95-98 — Both canonicalize calls use unwrap_or_else discarding the error entirely. On permissions errors or broken intermediate symlinks, comparison silently degrades. Fix: log warning on non-ENOENT errors.

title: Separate managed symlinks from local skills in library
description:
Managed skills (from package managers like Claude plugins) are symlinked into the library, but these symlinks contain absolute machine-specific paths. When the library is a git repo (e.g. coding-agent-files), these symlinks get committed and show as broken paths on GitHub (e.g. skills/writing-plans -> /Users/martin/.claude/plugins/...).

Problem: Mixing local skill files (actual content, should be committed) with managed symlinks (machine-specific, shouldn't be committed) in the same directory makes the library repo dirty with unportable symlinks.

Possible approaches:
- Separate subdirectories: e.g. library/local/ for real files, library/managed/ for symlinks (gitignore the managed dir)
- A .gitignore generation step that excludes managed skill entries
- Store managed references as metadata rather than symlinks (resolve to symlinks only during distribute)

Design should consider: the library is the source of truth for distribution, so both local and managed skills need to be discoverable. The split must not break the distribute step which iterates the library.

title: distribute.rs:82 comment about real directories is factually wrong
description: distribute.rs:82 — Library contains both real dirs (local) and symlinks (managed). Parenthetical is a relic of v0.2 transition. Fix: remove or rewrite.

title: Missing test: lockfile schema version mismatch on load silently succeeds
description: lockfile.rs — load() does not validate version field. A lockfile with version=999 silently loads. Add test documenting current behavior.

title: Missing test: parent-path candidate for installed_plugins.json
description: discover.rs — discover_claude_plugins_reads_json only tests direct path. Parent-directory fallback candidate has no test.

title: Missing test: now_iso8601 checks format only — date correctness not verified
description: manifest.rs — now_iso8601_format test asserts format but not date correctness. days_to_ymd has no leap year or century exception tests.

title: Missing test: present_changes in non-TTY mode in update.rs
description: update.rs — present_changes interactive vs non-interactive paths. Only diff() is unit-tested. Need test verifying quiet mode returns empty newly_disabled.

title: Missing test: dry-run path for managed symlink cleanup in cleanup_library
description: cleanup.rs — cleanup_removes_managed_symlink tests real-run only. The dry-run branch for managed symlinks has no test.

title: SkillProvenance.version uses empty string as absent sentinel — change to Option<String>
description: discover.rs — version: String with empty=absent is leaky. lockfile::generate() has special branch. Fix: change to Option<String>, handle in scan_install_records.

title: DiscoveredSkill managed+provenance fields can be inconsistent — replace with SkillOrigin enum
description: discover.rs — managed: bool and provenance: Option can be contradictory. Replace with enum SkillOrigin { Managed { provenance: Option }, Local }. Larger refactor touching discover.rs, library.rs, manifest.rs, lib.rs.

title: Lockfile.skills and UpdateDiff.changes use String map keys instead of SkillName
description: lockfile.rs, update.rs — BTreeMap<String, ...> breaks newtype discipline. present_changes does runtime SkillName::new(). Fix: change to BTreeMap<SkillName, ...>.

title: canonicalize fallback warning in cleanup does not explain consequence
description: cleanup.rs:125-132, lib.rs:576-583 — Warning emitted but does not tell user stale symlinks may not be cleaned. Fix: extend warning text.

title: .ok() silently drops skill exclusion validation in wizard
description: wizard.rs:423-425 — SkillName::new(...).ok() discards validation errors. A future stricter rule would silently omit a skill the user requested to exclude. Fix: filter_map with warning.

title: SystemTime unwrap_or_default silently records epoch on clock-skewed systems
description: manifest.rs:175-177 — duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH).unwrap_or_default() returns Duration::ZERO if clock before epoch. Records 1970-01-01 with no warning. Fix: emit warning eprintln.

title: doctor.rs:353 hardcoded manifest filename in user-facing error message
description: doctor.rs:353 — Error message has literal '.tome-manifest.json' instead of using MANIFEST_FILENAME constant.

title: lib.rs:17-19 Public API doc comment is incomplete
description: lib.rs:17-19 — Lists config, cli, run() only. Missing TomePaths and SyncReport which are also public. Fix: extend list.

title: manifest.rs:172 now_iso8601 is pub but only used internally
description: manifest.rs:172 — now_iso8601() is pub but has no external consumers. Change to pub(crate).

title: status.rs:259 Single pass comment is wrong — two read_dir traversals occur
description: status.rs:259 — count_health_issues does two read_dir passes not one. Fix comment.

title: wizard.rs:289 codex target vs source path discrepancy is undocumented
description: wizard.rs:289 — KNOWN_TARGETS codex uses .agents/skills but KNOWN_SOURCES uses .codex/skills. Add clarifying comment.

title: cleanup.rs:87 v0.1.x version reference is misleading at v0.3.3
description: cleanup.rs:87 and doctor.rs — 'leftover broken symlinks from v0.1.x' confuses managed symlinks. Rewrite without version reference.

title: status.rs old show() tests only assert Ok — not actual output content
description: status.rs — Several tests call show() and assert Ok(()). Do not verify printed content. Convert to use gather() assertions.

title: SkillName and TargetName duplicate identical validation logic
description: discover.rs, config.rs — Both ::new() have identical validation. Extract private validate_identifier(name) shared function to eliminate divergence risk.

title: Config and Source have all fields pub with optional post-construction validate()
description: config.rs — Fields all pub, validate() is opt-in post-construction. Nothing prevents using unvalidated Config. Consider ValidatedConfig newtype or pub(crate) fields. Larger refactor.

title: unwrap_or_default on Path::parent produces empty PathBuf in plugin discovery
description: discover.rs:217-224 — When source.path has no parent, unwrap_or_default yields PathBuf empty string. Safe but confusing. Fix: use conditional Vec push.

title: TomePaths: add invariant that library_dir must be under tome_home
description: paths.rs — TomePaths validates absolute paths but not that library_dir is under tome_home. Add soft ensure or document the choice.

title: Manifest.is_empty and len gated behind cfg(test) unnecessarily
description: manifest.rs — is_empty() and len() are reasonable queries. Remove #[cfg(test)] gate.

title: Introduce ContentHash newtype validating SHA-256 hex format
description: manifest.rs, lockfile.rs — content_hash: String admits any string. ContentHash(String) with [0-9a-f]{64} validation would prevent malformed hashes.

title: DistributeResult.target_name is String — should be TargetName
description: distribute.rs — target_name: String breaks newtype discipline. Change to TargetName.

title: MachinePrefs.disabled and disabled_targets fields should be pub(crate)
description: machine.rs — disable()/disable_target() mutation methods exist but fields are pub. Make pub(crate).
